Rtc Base Object
RtcBaseObject

For each XML file, the writer contains a public static method that creates an XDocument. Each method in this needs the rtc model (or a property of it) directly instead of the generated DataAccess Objects. The exporter calls each of these methods and saves the XDocument to file. Moreover, It would be better if each file has its own writer class.

Connection point
ConnectionPoint
All rtc object data classes have (too much) import/export logic. These objects should not be responsible for converting themselves into xml objects or providing information to do so.

Validation model
RealTimeControlModelValidator
Validates the real-time control model. Calls the ControlGroupValidator in the Validate method.

Validation control group
ControlGroupValidator
Validates the control group and the objects in it (rules, conditions and signbals).

File Validation

Validate xml against xsd
Validator
Validates the exported xml files against the corresponding xsd files.

In general, the domain objects of the rtc model contain too much data and logic that should belong to the export domain of the plugin. Ideally, it would be nice if we could use the same data access layer for exporting as the one we use for importing (the auto-generated classes from xsd) to serialize the objects into XML. Converters for converting the data objects into the data access layers are necesarry so that we can strip all of the "writing xml" logic from the data objects (the rtc objects).
Moreover, there are a couple of issues where we have seen our side of the implementation is wrong or is not consistent with the manual (such as certain names in the gui vs. in the manual vs. in the code, etc.). Mainly, the implementation of the exporter is not entirely implemented correctly, we know of some cases where incorrect values are written to file.

Export model
(as part of integrated model)

treeVector.xsd
rtcRuntimeConfig.xsd
rtcToolsConfig.xsd
rtcDataConfig.xsd
pi_timeseries.xsd
treeVector.xsd

state_export.xml
rtcRuntimeConfig.xml
rtcToolsConfig.xml
rtcDataConfig.xml
timeseries_import.xml
state_import.xml

Dimr runner
DimrRunner

Is responsible for sending the model input to the kernel and making sure the model is valid before exporting. The DimrRunner also monitors the status of the model.  A model must implement the interface IDimrModel to be handled by this class.


properties

bool CanCommunicateWithDimrApi

IDimrApi Api

void OnProgressChanged

void OnExecute

void OnFinish

void OnCleanup
